response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, particularly in high-performance and event-driven systems, but his expertise predominantly lies in web, mobile, and embedded development with languages like TypeScript, Node.js, D, and Java. While he has C/C++ experience from National Instruments and some industrial automation exposure, his recent work and core competencies do not align closely with the Senior Manager—Digital Solutions role, which requires deep C++ expertise, industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), and cloud/platform solutions for automation machinery. The lack of recent C++ development, STL, multi-threading, or secure development lifecycle practices raises concerns about his fit for this specialized role.
strengths: Strong background in high-performance and event-driven systems (e.g., Dlang, Node.js, real-time applications)
Experience with industrial automation and IoT platforms (GISCollective, Green Map Association)
Proven track record in architectural design, mentorship, and agile methodologies (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, TDD)
concerns: Limited recent C++ and STL experience (last significant C++ work in 2015 at National Instruments)
No demonstrated expertise in industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443-4-1) or secure development lifecycle
Lack of cloud platform experience (e.g., Microsoft Azure) and hybrid on-premises/cloud solution delivery

key_factors.factor: Cloud and on-premises hybrid solution experience
